title: FurnaceEnhanced
description: Adjustable furnace cooking speed for faster smelting.
body:
# ⚡ Furnace Enhanced ⚡

FurnaceEnhanced is a Bukkit/Spigot plugin that allows configurable furnace cook time reduction based on player permissions.

### Features
- **Cook Time Reduction:** Reduce furnace smelting times based on permissions (e.g., `furnaceenhanced.10` for 10% reduction).  
- **Update Checker:** Automatically notifies ops of new versions (configurable interval).  

### Permissions
- `furnaceenhanced.<number>` — Reduces smelting time by `<number>` percent. Higher numbers override lower numbers.

### Configuration
- Update checker can be enabled/disabled in the plugin config.  
- Check interval is configurable (default 12 hours).  
- Real and virtual furnaces are supported; virtual furnaces require an inventory holder for metadata tracking.

### Authors
- Original Author: `mvez73`  
- Continued by: `BitByLogic`

### Notes
- Cook time reduction only applies if permissions are properly set.
- Works for both real and virtual furnaces.
